chapter_title.ar: باب التَّعْزِيَةِ وَ مَا يَجِبُ عَلَى صَاحِبِ الْمُصِيبَةِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 70 – The condolences and what is Obligated upon the one with the difficulties (the bereaved)

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/122)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/122)

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Khalid, from his father, from one of his companions,
from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The offering of condolences is the Obligation after the burial’.
en.sarwar: 4. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Khalid from his father from certain persons of his people who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that the necessary condolence should be offered after burial takes place.”
